positive: A minimalist and abstract forest scene illustration, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna silhouettes against a dark, cosmic navy background. The primary subject is a grouping of majestic, stylized glowing trees and delicate winged creatures, forming a central, harmonious composition. Use high contrast black silhouettes set against vibrant electric teal and deep indigo gradients. The style should be clean, vector-graphic, and pop-art inspired, suitable for a repeating textile pattern. Emphasize sharp edges, geometric clarity, and negative space. Cinematic, vibrant lighting, highly detailed linework, centered composition.
